segment.source: Renders a hero with headline and subheadline above two side-by-side cards, each holding its own title, rich-text description, and button (filled left, outlined right). Use it for: openers addressing two audiences or paths at once — sign up versus contact sales, for companies versus for individuals, buy versus sell. Prefer 'Split Call to Action' for the same two-card pattern deeper in the page; 'Hero Section' when a single message with two buttons suffices.
